cases.name: stale_cluster_state_base
cases.reason: Cluster-state diffs whose base UUID does not match the cached state must reject without mutating prior cache.

cases.name: remote_node_unavailable
cases.reason: Remote node connection failure must surface as a transport-level I/O error.

cases.name: search_routing_hole
cases.reason: Search forwarding must fail closed when cached routing has no started shard copy.

cases.name: custom_metadata_reject
cases.reason: Unsupported metadata custom payloads must reject and preserve prior cache.

cases.name: remote_transport_exception_unwrap
cases.reason: Remote transport exception payloads must unwrap into a typed outer error with preserved nested cause.

cases.name: write_forwarding_gate_disabled
cases.reason: Phase B write forwarding must reject immediately unless the explicit safety gate is enabled.

cases.name: unsupported_write_action
cases.reason: Write-forwarding requests outside the bounded Phase B allow-list must fail closed.
